case_title: MCCOLM, PATRICIA A. VS NORDSTROM INCORPORATED, ET AL et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MCCOLM, PATRICIA A. AS TO DEFENDANT NORDSTROM INCORPORATED,  ET AL FLAHERTY, ANN MOSLEY, JEFF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
PLAINTIFF PATRICIA MCCOLM HAS AN IFP STATUS IN SUPERIOR COURT. WAS ENTERED AS AN EXEMPT WHICH IS INCORRECT.
PLFTS COPY AND DEFTS COPY SENT TO PATRICIA MCCOLM ALSO SENT COPY TO NORDSTROM AND COPY TO ATTY OF DEFT IN LARKSPUR.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT NORDSTROM INCORPORATED,  ET AL FLAHERTY, ANN MOSLEY, JEFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO NORDSTROM INC, ET AL RETURNED. ENVELOPE STATES WRONG ADRESS.
THE DISMISSAL ORDERED ON 4/25/97 BE SET ASIDE AND THE MATTER BE ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. NUNC PRO TUNC TO 4/25/97.
SIGNED ORDER MAILED TO BOTH PLFT & DEFT.
COPY OF ORDER RE SETTING ASIDE OF DISMISSAL ORDER & MATTER BE ORDERED OFF CALENDAR SENT TO ANN FLAHERTY RETURNED-NOT KNOWN.
COPY OF ORDER TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL ORDER ON 4/25/97 & MATTER BE OFF CALENDAR TO NORDSTROM INC. RETURNED-WRONG ADDRESS.
COPY OF ORDER TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL ORDER ON 4/25/97 & MATTER BE OFF CALENDAR TO JEFF MOSLEY RETURNED-NOT KNOWN.
